packDescription: Journey through the magical world of Narnia with 400 questions covering the beloved Chronicles series - from Aslan's sacrifice to the Last Battle, explore characters, locations, creatures, magic, and the rich symbolism woven throughout C.S. Lewis's masterpiece.
